name: Cell Thawing (Recovery)

components.name: 4. 转移至 9 mL 预热培养基
components.note: 逐滴加入, 缓冲 DMSO 浓度变化

components.name: 5. 离心 200×g, 5 min (推荐) 或直接铺板
components.note: 大多数细胞系建议离心去 DMSO; 极脆弱细胞可跳过直接铺板

components.name: 6. 弃上清, 新鲜完全培养基重悬, 接种培养瓶
8. 次日换液去除残余 DMSO 和死细胞碎片
9. 恢复 1–2 代后开始实验

notes.en: Quick-thaw to recover frozen cells. Key is speed — DMSO is cytotoxic at 37°C. Most cell lines: centrifuge to remove DMSO. Very fragile cells (e.g., primary neurons): dilute directly without centrifugation. Check viability >90% after recovery. Allow 1–2 passages before experiments.
notes.zh: 关键是速度——DMSO 在 37°C 对细胞有毒。解冻至剩小冰晶即可。大多数细胞系建议离心去 DMSO；极脆弱细胞（如原代神经元）可直接稀释铺板。恢复后确认活力 >90%。

ref: Freshney (2015) Culture of Animal Cells; ATCC Cell Thawing Protocol

briefSteps.en: Pre-warm medium → quick-thaw cryovial at 37°C → dilute into 9 mL medium → centrifuge → resuspend in fresh medium → plate → incubate overnight → change medium next day
briefSteps.zh: 预热培养基 → 37°C 快速解冻冻存管 → 逐滴加入 9 mL 培养基稀释 → 离心 → 新鲜培养基重悬 → 接种培养瓶 → 过夜培养 → 次日换液

detailedSteps.en: Pre-warm complete culture medium to 37°C in a water bath (at least 30 min before use).
detailedSteps.zh: 提前将完全培养基在 37°C 水浴中预热（使用前至少预热 30 min）。

detailedSteps.en: Retrieve cryovial from liquid nitrogen storage wearing cryogenic gloves and face shield; transport on dry ice.
detailedSteps.zh: 佩戴低温手套和面罩从液氮中取出冻存管，干冰转运。

detailedSteps.en: Immediately transfer the cryovial to a 37°C water bath and thaw rapidly with gentle agitation until only a small ice crystal remains (~1–2 min). Do not over-thaw.
detailedSteps.zh: 立即将冻存管转移至 37°C 水浴，轻柔晃动快速解冻至剩小冰晶即可（约 1–2 min），不可过度解冻。

detailedSteps.en: Wipe the outside of the vial with 70% ethanol; open in the biosafety cabinet and transfer contents to a 15 mL conical tube.
detailedSteps.zh: 用 70% 乙醇擦拭冻存管外壁，在生物安全柜中开管，将内容物转移至 15 mL 离心管。

detailedSteps.en: Add pre-warmed complete medium dropwise (1 mL first, then 8 mL more) to dilute DMSO gradually, gently swirling between additions.
detailedSteps.zh: 逐滴加入预热完全培养基（先 1 mL，再 8 mL）稀释 DMSO，每次加入后轻柔旋转混匀。

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge at 200–300 × g for 5 min at room temperature to pellet cells. (Skip centrifugation for very fragile cells and plate directly.)
detailedSteps.zh: 200–300 × g 室温离心 5 min 收集细胞（极脆弱细胞可跳过离心，直接铺板）。

detailedSteps.en: Aspirate supernatant completely to remove DMSO; resuspend pellet in 5–10 mL pre-warmed complete medium.
detailedSteps.zh: 彻底吸去上清以去除 DMSO，用 5–10 mL 预热完全培养基重悬细胞沉淀。

detailedSteps.en: Transfer cell suspension to a pre-labelled culture flask or dish and place in 37°C, 5% CO₂ incubator.
detailedSteps.zh: 将细胞悬液转移至预标记培养瓶或皿，置于 37°C、5% CO₂ 培养箱中。

detailedSteps.en: Next morning (~16–24 h later): replace medium completely with fresh pre-warmed complete medium to remove residual DMSO and dead cell debris.
detailedSteps.zh: 次日（约 16–24 h 后）完全换液，加入新鲜预热完全培养基，去除残余 DMSO 和死细胞碎片。

detailedSteps.en: Allow cells to recover for 1–2 passages (checking morphology and viability >90%) before using in experiments.
detailedSteps.zh: 细胞恢复传代 1–2 次（确认形态正常、活力 >90%）后再用于实验。

note.en: After plating, cells incubate overnight at 37°C; change medium next morning to remove residual DMSO.
note.zh: 铺板后细胞 37°C 过夜培养；次日早上换液去除残留 DMSO。

usage.en: Recover cryopreserved mammalian cells from liquid nitrogen storage.
usage.zh: 从液氮中复苏冻存的哺乳动物细胞。
